raw_request:
Authorized flyer/source artwork update.
Authorized relationship note: co-owner.
Use saved Lakshmis Kitchen account details.

Original customer request: I'd like you use this flyer for Lakshmi's Kitchen. Do not change anything else in the flyer, except the changes asked explicitly. Changes I want. 1. Replace Triveni Express with Lakshmi's Kitchen branding. 2. Replace phone number to +1 555 010 0100. 3. Veg Thali Special, replace Rice with Jeera Rice.
Uploaded reference image/template is attached. Use it when designing this flyer.
